per_prompt.prompt: Summarize the plot of Romeo and Juliet in one sentence.
per_prompt.decoded: Two star-crossed lovers from feuding noble families take their own lives in a tragic misunderstanding, ultimately transforming their deaths into a catalyst for peace between their households.
